query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM esrs_datapoints) as esrs_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regulations) as regulations_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gs1_standards) as gs1_standards_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gs1_attributes) as gs1_attributes_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hub_news) as news_count;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 31QbGTVHxF7ThTp.root --database cozU6EotfgGjqPV9552owj --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM esrs_datapoints) as esrs_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regulations) as regulations_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gs1_standards) as gs1_standards_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gs1_attributes) as gs1_attributes_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hub_news) as news_count;
